en: If your company performs any of the following services and is required to maintain the relevant certification(s) for those services, you will be asked to provide your certificate in a subsequent form.
Avetta PQF - Canada COA Applicability Assessment

The Certificate of Authorization (COA), issued by the Technical Standards and Safety Authority (TSSA) in Ontario, Canada, is a regulatory license required for organizations performing activities under the province’s Technical Standards and Safety Act, 2000 and O. Reg. 220/01: Boilers and Pressure Vessels. Companies which design, manufacture, assemble, repair, or alter pressure equipment (e.g., boilers, pressure vessels, fittings) are required to maintain this certificate.
